title: T-032 — Catch-weight entry: variance soft-warning when item.weight_mode='catch'
prompt:
# T-032 — Catch-weight entry + variance soft-warning

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.3 FR-08-E3-004, §6 D13, §16.4 V-PROD-17, §5.2#7

## Goal
Extend register-output for items where weight_mode='catch' to require catch_weight_kg_per_unit array, store as catch_weight_details JSONB, and compute variance vs item.avg_unit_kg with ±10% soft warning.

## Implementation contract
In register-output, when item.weight_mode='catch', require catch_weight_kg_per_unit (number[]) in body. Persist as catch_weight_details = {per_unit_kg: [...], avg_kg, total_kg, variance_pct}. Compute variance = abs(avg_kg - item.avg_unit_kg)/item.avg_unit_kg. If variance > 0.10 (default tolerance from prod_settings.catch_weight_tolerance_pct), set catch_weight_details.variance_warning=true (soft warning, P1; D13 hard P2). Return existing 200 body extended with catch_weight_summary {avg_kg, total_kg, variance_pct, warning}.

## Files (scope)
- packages/api-services/production/register-output.ts [modify]
- packages/api-services/production/__tests__/catch-weight.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given item.weight_mode='catch' and catch_weight_kg_per_unit=[1.0,1.05,0.95] item.avg_unit_kg=1.0, when POST /outputs, then 200 + catch_weight_summary.avg_kg=1.0 and warning=false
2. Given catch_weight_kg_per_unit=[2.0,2.0,2.0] item.avg_unit_kg=1.0 (>10% variance), when POST, then 200 + warning=true and variance_pct=1.0
3. Given item.weight_mode='catch' and missing catch_weight_kg_per_unit, when POST, then 422 ValidationError listing catch_weight_kg_per_unit

## Test strategy
- RED: test asserting variance computation + warning + missing-field 422 before service change
- Run 'pnpm --filter api-services test catch-weight'

## Risk red lines
- Do not hard-block on variance >10% (P1 = soft warning only per D13)
- Do not skip catch_weight_details persistence (audit trail)
- Do not require catch_weight when item.weight_mode='nominal'

pipeline_inputs.description: Catch-weight entry: array per unit, variance soft-warning P1 (D13 P2 hard).
pipeline_inputs.details: Extends register-output. When item.weight_mode='catch', body requires catch_weight_kg_per_unit array. Persisted on wo_outputs.catch_weight_details JSONB. Variance computed vs item.avg_unit_kg, default tolerance 10% from prod_settings. Soft warning P1.
out_of_scope: Do not implement scale integration (D13 P2)
acceptance_criteria: Given catch array near avg, when POST, then 200 + warning=false
Given variance >10%, when POST, then 200 + warning=true and variance_pct populated
Given weight_mode=catch and missing catch array, when POST, then 422 listing catch_weight_kg_per_unit
test_strategy: RED: test asserting variance + warning + missing-field 422 before service change
risk_red_lines: Do not require catch_weight for nominal items
